steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content: The blank is introduced by a participial phrase followed by a main clause with a subject and predicate.

steps.title: Apply the modifier rule
steps.content:
An introductory participial phrase must logically modify the sentence subject.

Choice D correctly uses amorphous ice as the subject, fitting the description in the participle.

The other three either mistakenly begin with ice Ih (contradicting the description) or use an abstract noun that cannot be modified by molecular structure.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
